name: qa-paystore-desafio
description: Desafio técnico de QA: API Swagger Petstore e frontend Phoebus

scripts.test:api: newman run postman/Swagger-Petstore-QA.postman_collection.json -e postman/Swagger-Petstore-QA.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export relatorios/newman-report.html --reporter-htmlextra-title 'Swagger Petstore - QA'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
